gandy.name: Gandy Pool
gandy.type: Heated 10-lane, 25-yard pool with attached recreation pool
gandy.published_configuration: Heated 10-lane, 25-yard short-course pool with one-meter diving board and attached 3–4 foot recreation pool
gandy.operating_pattern: Year-round operations with lap swim and open swim

inventory_profile.reason: Larger year-round program load and heated-pool operation

gandy.comparison_notes: Higher program complexity and year-round use create greater staffing, scheduling, chemical, and maintenance demands.

simpson.name: Simpson Park Pool
simpson.address: 1725 Martin Luther King Jr. Avenue, Lakeland, FL 33805
simpson.published_configuration: Seasonal neighborhood aquatics facility associated with Simpson Park Community Center
simpson.operating_pattern: Seasonal summer operation with lap and open swim

inventory_profile.reason: Shorter operating season and lower assumed daily demand

simpson.comparison_notes: Seasonal operation reduces annual operating volume but increases the importance of opening, closing, and seasonal-readiness tasks.
